page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across most standard workloads. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1254.0 and a multi-core score of 4891.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 9399.28. Memory performance is stable, with read-only small block cached bandwidth reaching 463.02 GB/sec and large block uncached write bandwidth at 34.66 GB/sec. However, the instance exhibits weaker performance in specific tasks, such as bzip3 decompression and Geekbench image processing, and struggles significantly with larger workloads, as shown by poor LLM inference speeds on 7B models.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density, the ecs.hfg7.2xlarge offers a reliable profile for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the overhead of GPU hardware. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database operations, as demonstrated by its average score of 3010.66 in Passmark database tests and 7.65 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 32.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark results place the instance in the average tier for standard operations, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 4891.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 9399.28. While it exhibits weaker performance in complex decompression and image processing tasks, its dedicated CPU allocation makes it highly suitable for software compilation, static web serving, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.2xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering reliable performance for standard business workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.2xlarge is an x86_64 instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 32 GB RAM, optimized for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel Xeon instance offering balanced memory and compute resources for standard enterprise workloads and web serving.
